issues.detail: The skill does not address scenarios where the user has no friends/family or community contacts, leaving gaps in guidance.
The instructions contain verbose sections that could be streamlined for quicker reference.

scenarios.name: Plan to land first 10 paying SaaS customers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the three Concentric Circles structure (friends/family, community, cold outreach) with the required Output Format (10-person lists, personalized template, pricing, weekly goal) plus the 'don't launch before 100 customers' rule; baseline gives generic Product Hunt / paid ads advice that ignores founder-led manual sales sequencing.

scenarios.name: Pricing decision for a new product (free vs paid)
scenarios.rationale: Treatment invokes the zero-price-effect rule (never free, gap from $0 to $1 > $1 to $100), recommends starting low and raising over time, and distinguishes cost-based vs value-based pricing per the skill; baseline tends to recommend a free tier or freemium without the skill's specific framing.
